# בני הממליץ — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A free sports recommendations group called 'Beni HaMemalitz' (Beni the Recommender), boasting an impressive 87% success rate in the last month. The brand is built on trust, credibility, and results — positioning itself as a reliable tipster community. The primary call-to-action is a WhatsApp group join link, making it a community-driven, accessible service.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About בני הממליץ
A free sports recommendations group called 'Beni HaMemalitz' (Beni the Recommender), boasting an impressive 87% success rate in the last month. The brand is built on trust, credibility, and results — positioning itself as a reliable tipster community. The primary call-to-action is a WhatsApp group join link, making it a community-driven, accessible service.

## Services/Products
- המלצות ספורט בחינם
- קישור הצטרפות לקבוצת וואטסאפ

## Target Audience
אנשים המעוניינים בהמלצות ספורט

## Industry
ספורט / הימורי ספורט

---
